name: orchestrator
description: Minimal NestJS orchestrator bootstrap for AI Content Engine

scripts.test: corepack pnpm build && node --test dist/contracts/contracts.service.test.js dist/auth/auth.service.test.js dist/generations/generate.controller.test.js dist/generations/generate.service.test.js dist/generations/generations.controller.test.js dist/generations/generations-query.service.test.js dist/performance-events/performance-events.controller.test.js dist/performance-events/performance-events.service.test.js dist/pipeline/pipeline-executor.test.js dist/pipeline/pipeline-recovery.service.test.js dist/mvp-flow.integration.test.js
